'''Xend''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Xend system/Legends|Xend system]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] Territories.<ref name="Atlas" /> It was a [[Forest/Legends|forested]] world that was primarily inhabited by various [[Species/Legends|species]] of insects and the [[winged xendrite]]s that preyed upon them.<ref name="Creatures of the Galaxy" />

{{Planet-stub}}
